summary: High‑energy show with standout “Hard to Handle” and a quoted The Other One, captured in a good‑quality recording that includes the New Riders for extra concert ambience.
review: Fans rave about Jerry Garcia’s extended pedal‑steel work with the New Riders of the Purple Sage and praise the soaring solo on “Hard to Handle.” Bob Weir’s clever WRS quote inside the second half of The Other One is also highlighted. While one reviewer notes the missing “Me and Bobby McGee” track, no technical flaws are reported, suggesting a solid listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Four out of five reviews give 5‑star praise for performance and atmosphere; one low rating is due only to a missing song, not recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific sound issues mentioned; inclusion of the New Riders set adds a live‑concert feel and suggests a decent mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers appreciate the continuity provided by the New Riders portion, noting an hour‑plus of Jerry’s pedal steel and smooth transitions into the Dead's second set.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Provides over an hour of pedal‑steel guitar with the New Riders, highlighted as a major positive.
band_member_comments.Bob: Weir quotes the WRS at :39 and :45 during the second part of The Other One.
